acceleration_tactics.first_contact_to_first_reply: Try a different subject line or send time. Consider a pattern interrupt follow-up.
acceleration_tactics.first_reply_to_qualified: Add urgency - mention limited campaign slots. Share a relevant case study.
acceleration_tactics.qualified_to_proposal_sent: Offer to jump on a quick call to discuss needs. Remove friction from proposal process.
acceleration_tactics.proposal_sent_to_negotiation: Follow up with a time-limited incentive. Address common objections proactively.
acceleration_tactics.negotiation_to_closed: Create urgency around campaign timing. Offer flexible payment terms or package options.
